query:
SELECT g.name, g.code, cc.name as cost_center, COUNT(w.id) as workers_count
FROM `groups` g
LEFT JOIN cost_centers cc ON g.cost_center_id = cc.id
LEFT JOIN workers w ON w.group_id = g.id
GROUP BY g.id, g.name, g.code, cc.name
ORDER BY g.id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3UmgapDHiQE9iXi.root --database BmzBEddPNYVc6c68xYfpnY --execute SELECT g.name, g.code, cc.name as cost_center, COUNT(w.id) as workers_count
FROM `groups` g
LEFT JOIN cost_centers cc ON g.cost_center_id = cc.id
LEFT JOIN workers w ON w.group_id = g.id
GROUP BY g.id, g.name, g.code, cc.name
ORDER BY g.id;
